headline: 今日AI速览：学术研究最活跃
narrative:
今日共收录269篇AI新闻，分类分布：学术研究189篇, 开源项目41篇, 模型发布30篇, 产品/API9篇。热门标签：Agent（78篇）。其中14%的文章有多来源交叉验证。

▸ rohitg00 /ai-engineering-from-scratch：Learn it. Build it. Ship it for others.

▸ multica-ai /andrej-karpathy-skills：A single CLAUDE.md file to improve Claude Code behavior, derived from Andrej Karpathy's observations

▸ earendil-works /pi：AI agent toolkit: coding agent CLI, unified LLM API, TUI & web UI libraries, Slack bot, vLLM pods

▸ colbymchenry /codegraph：Pre-indexed code knowledge graph for Claude Code, Codex, Cursor, OpenCode, and Hermes Agent — fewer 

▸ multica-ai /multica：The open-source managed agents platform. Turn coding agents into real teammates — assign tasks, trac
text: 今日共收录269篇AI新闻，分类分布：学术研究189篇, 开源项目41篇, 模型发布30篇, 产品/API9篇。热门标签：Agent（78篇）。其中14%的文章有多来源交叉验证。
